title: BSNC Announces the Election of Roy Ashenfelter as the Chair of the Board of Directors
summary: BSNC is proud to announce the election of Roy Ashenfelter as the Chair of the Board of Directors. Serving on the BSNC Board since 1999, Ashenfelter, originally from White Mountain and now residing in Nome, is a dedicated advocate for the preservation of the subsistence lifestyle. “Roy’s commitment a...

title: 2023 Tribal Administrators’ Annual Gathering
summary: Join us for an incredible event where tribal administrators from all over the state will come together to connect, learn, and collaborate. title: Council Action on Chum Bycatch, October 2023
summary: The North Pacific Fishery Management Council is evaluating additional management actions to minimize the bycatch of western Alaska origin chum salmon bycatch to the extent practicable in the Bering Sea pollock fishery (Magnuson Stevens Act National Standard 9) while achieving optimum yield in the Be...

title: October 2023 Meeting – Anchorage
summary: Newsletter , Agenda . The Council met October 2-10 at the Hilton Hotel in Anchorage, Alaska. You can listen to the meeting via our YouTube channel . Learn More →
